stall_root_cause: UI called 19_run_plan_scanner_pipeline.py (validator) + 33_worker_operations_export.py (exporter). Detection scripts 01-18 were never called. Progress was time-based: min(95, round((elapsed_seconds / 900) * 100)). Actual pipeline ran in < 1 second on empty outputs.
fix_applied: 34_ui_plan_scan_orchestrator.py — calls all detection stages in order, writes real stage progress to state/scan_progress.json

02_extract_vectors.quick_win: checksum cache — skip if PDF unchanged

03_analyze_colors_geometry.bottleneck: pixel-level color stats on rasterized pages

15_scale_measurement.bottleneck: none; Shapely wire-up would add robustness

bottlenecks_ranked.issue: no caching — re-extracts full PDF on every run
bottlenecks_ranked.fix: MD5/SHA256 checksum of source PDF → skip if outputs exist and hash matches

bottlenecks_ranked.issue: per-cluster template matching with full catalog
bottlenecks_ranked.fix: pre-filter by color bin before template matching; use spatial index
reduce raster DPI for color stats pass (150 DPI sufficient)

bottlenecks_ranked.issue: Python 3.9.6 — 20-25% slower than 3.12 on numeric loops
bottlenecks_ranked.fix: rebuild venv with system Python 3.12 or pyenv

quick_wins_tier1.impact: enables DXF-native parsing if source is DXF — 10x faster extraction
enables Hebrew OCR in scripts 10+11; currently zero Hebrew capability
more robust polyline length calculation for scale bar detection
eliminates re-extraction on retry/re-run — saves 30-120s per repeat scan

quick_wins_tier2.action: smoke test EasyOCR on one sign crop
quick_wins_tier2.risk: 200MB download + CUDA/MPS probe on first run

quick_wins_tier2.action: smoke test networkx for sign graph grouping

no_short_path_to_10s_scan: A raw PDF with 50k+ paths requires real vector extraction. No tooling change eliminates this. 10-second scan is only achievable for trivially small plans or with pre-parsed DXF source.
